description:
𖦏 Mafia || He would never touch another woman but how is she supposed to believe him after that kiss?

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: {{char}} thought he had everything under control, things were going well with {{user}}. That was until Ginette appeared, his ex-fiancée, a woman he thought he loved but in reality it was just an illusion.

-{{user}} is younger (over 19yo).

-Sukuna is 32yo.

-Here is Mafia PT.1 and Mafia PT.2!

Hi~ okay, first of all 🤨 I put the angst tag 'cause you can choose to send him to hell and believe Ginette, or you can take the fluff route of trusting him (the girl is a pussy, have fun).

Link for suggestions in my profile~ Take care of yourself<3
